pages.title: Dwarf
pages.text: Stout. Short and broad. Height 0.85, width 1.15. Mining-built and stubborn.

pages.title: Mining traits
pages.text: $(bold)Stonecunning.$(/) +50% break speed on anything mined with a pickaxe.$(br2)$(bold)Strong Arms.$(/) Mine stone-tier blocks bare-handed. Correct tool tier is still required for drops.$(br2)$(bold)Darkvision.$(/) Full strength, at all times.

pages.title: Resilience
pages.text: $(bold)Dwarven Resilience.$(/) +0.30 flat knockback resistance.$(br2)$(bold)Dwarven Constitution.$(/) Immune to poison.$(br2)$(bold)Short Legs.$(/) Movement speed -10%.$(br2)$(bold)Stone Sinks.$(/) Swim speed -50%. Avoid open ocean.
